race.comment: NIELSEN PARK (3) first-up for the new yard he closed strongly with the 59kg for an unlucky second over 1000m at Muswellbrook. Drops further in weight from the good draw and should relish the extra trip. Go close. SIDE QUEST (5) back for her second campaign and should be near her top for this third-up. Comes out of a strong contest after finishing fast to secure fourth over 1200m at Tamworth. Claim helps again and don't dismiss. CASSIE'S ANGEL (1) dropped in trip and progressed nicely second-up with an eye-catching second over 1100m at Scone. Maps well with the claim and anticipating another big run. LOOKING THE PART (2) returns from a break of seven months. Ran some nice races in the first prep and since fitted with the one trial over 1000m at Scone. Can stalk the speed with the claim and take a hand in the finish.
